requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3与危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3與危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium-ion cells and batteries shipped to Montenegro normally need UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 transport test evidence and the related test summary before air, sea, road, or multimodal movement. Transport compliance is separate from ISME product conformity, REGAGEN storage requirements, CGES interconnection rules, and customs documentation.
summary.zh: 运往黑山的锂离子电芯和电池通常需要具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第III部分第38.3条运输测试证据及相关测试概要，方可进行航空、海运、公路或多式联运。运输合规独立于 ISME 产品符合性、REGAGEN 储能要求、CGES 并网规则和海关文件。
summary.zht: 運往黑山的鋰離子電芯和電池通常需要具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第III部分第38.3條運輸測試證據及相關測試概要，方可進行航空、海運、公路或多式聯運。運輸合規獨立於 ISME 產品符合性、REGAGEN 儲能要求、CGES 併網規則和海關文件。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
UN Model Regulations dangerous-goods framework for lithium batteries

summary.en: Chinese exporters often hold UN 38.3 reports and transport-condition identification documents issued for outbound lithium-battery shipments. These support route planning to Montenegro but do not remove the need for exact match of cell, battery, module state of charge, packaging, declaration, and modal transport rules for the selected route.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有用于锂电池出口运输的UN 38.3报告及运输条件鉴定文件。这些文件可支持发往黑山的运输方案，但必须按实际路线逐项匹配电芯、电池、模组、荷电状态、包装、危险货物申报和运输方式规则。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有用於鋰電池出口運輸的 UN 38.3 報告及運輸條件鑑定文件。這些文件可支持運往黑山的運輸方案，但必須按實際路線逐項匹配電芯、電池、模組、荷電狀態、包裝、危險貨物申報和運輸方式規則。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and lithium-battery test summary
China outbound dangerous-goods transport documentation for lithium batteries

gap.en: A BESS safety certificate does not satisfy dangerous-goods transport documentation. Exporters should prepare model-specific UN 38.3 reports, test summaries, SDS, packing instructions, battery net mass information, state-of-charge controls, and carrier-required declarations for the selected Montenegro route.
gap.zh: BESS安全证书不能替代危险货物运输文件。出口商应为发往黑山的具体路线准备型号对应的UN 38.3报告、测试概要、SDS、包装说明、电池净重信息、荷电状态控制以及承运人要求的申报文件。
gap.zht: BESS安全證書不能替代危險貨物運輸文件。出口商應為發往黑山的具體路線準備型號對應的UN 38.3報告、測試概要、SDS、包裝說明、電池淨重資料、荷電狀態控制以及承運人要求的申報文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated lithium-battery transport where UN dangerous-goods rules are incorporated by selected transport mode and route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for regulated outbound lithium-battery transport documentation; not a substitute for destination product or grid approval

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a shipment gate, not a Montenegro market approval. Match the transport test summary and dangerous-goods package to the exact shipped battery configuration and transport route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输门槛，不是黑山市场准入批准。应将运输测试摘要与危险货物包装与实际发运电池配置及运输路线逐项匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3 是運輸門檻，不是黑山市場准入批准。應將運輸測試摘要與危險貨物包裝與實際發運電池配置及運輸路線逐項匹配。
